channel.title: Blog on Tom M. Ragonneau
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Tom M. Ragonneau

item.title: An exercise that GPT-4 cannot solve
item.description: We present an exercise proposed by Dr. Dongyi Wei that GPT-4 cannot solve.

item.title: Kantorovich inequality
item.description: We provide two proofs of the Kantorovich inequality based on probability and optimization theories.
